basics.name: Yujin Choi
basics.summary: Postdoctoral Researcher at Nanyang Technological University (NTU). Focusing on Trustworthy AI, including privacy-preserving machine learning and machine unlearning.

work.summary: Collaborating with Prof. Jaehong Yoon on trustworthy machine learning.

education.summary: Advised by Prof. Jaewook Lee. Dissertation: Trustworthy Generative Model
